violations.text: The chlorine sanitizing dishwasher was observed in poor repair (observed at 0 ppm). Chlorine sanitizing dishwashers shall be 50-100 ppm. Person in charge notified production kitchen to send extra equipment/utensils prior to inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 02/02/2026

The dishwasher was observed in poor repair (not reaching 160 degrees Fahrenheit surface temperature). The dishwasher is to not be used until it can be repaired/replaced/serviced. Per PIC, establishment is pending repairs of dishwasher. All equipment and utensils to be sent to production kitchen to be washed, rinsed, and sanitized. New Violation. Correct By: 10/28/2025

The food-contact surfaces of equipment and utensils were not sanitized. The required utensil surface temperature of 160 degrees Fahrenheit was not achieved during the sanitizing cycle of the dishwasher as evidenced by the failure of the thermolabel (temperature indicator) affixed to the surface of a utensil to turn black. Establishment must follow variance procedures. All equipment and utensils to be sent to another facility to be washed/rinsed/sanitized. New Violation. Correct By: 09/24/2025

The dishwasher was observed in poor repair (not reaching 160 degrees Fahrenheit surface temperature). The dishwasher is to not be used until it can be repaired/replaced/serviced. New Violation. Correct By: 09/24/2025

Dishwasher observed to be out of service. Per PIC, all equipment and utensils are being sanitized with a quatnery ammonium solution and a rag. PIC notified that current sanitizing practices to be stopped. All equipment and utensils to be sent to production kitchen to be washed/rinsed/sanitized until dishwasher is repaired. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/06/2025

Establishment has an approved variance for 2-bay sink in the presence of a dishwasher. All equipment and utensils to be sent to production kitchen to be washed/rinsed/sanitized in the event that the dishwasher is down. Per PIC, dishes and utensils are to be cleaned with sanitizer and a rag due to dishwasher being out of service. New Violation. Correct By: 03/06/2025

A warewashing sanitizer dispenser was observed to be installed at the hand-washing sink. A hand-washing sink must not be used for purposes other than hand washing. New Violation. Correct By: 10/15/2024

At the time of inspection, chicken patties and sweet potato fries were observed received at 120 degrees Fahrenheit. Food was rejected at the time of delivery. New foods received above 150 degrees Fahrenheit. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/04/2024

Quaternary ammonium sanitizer solution was in excess of 400 parts per million (ppm). A quaternary ammonia sanitizer solution applied to food contact surfaces must be applied at the strength as indicated on the manufacturers' label. Proper sanitization concentration/practices were discussed with staff. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/04/2024

The chlorine sanitizer concentration for the sanitizing cycle of the dishwasher was (0 ) parts per million (ppm). Chlorine sanitizing solutions must be between 50-100 ppm. Dishwasher to be used only for washing. Sanitizer current dishes in 2 compartment sink. Per PIC, disposable plates and utensils will be used until dishwasher is serviced. New Violation. Correct By: 09/21/2023
